ground_truth.title: Salt Lake City | Electricians | KSL Services
ground_truth.main_content: 47 Business results for Electricians in Salt Lake City. Search form with What service do you need? field and City or Zip location field. Results displayed in a grid layout with sorting options including Best Match, Distance, Highest Rated, Most Rated, and Name (A-Z/Z-A). Each business listing shows the company name, star rating with number of reviews, phone number, and service area indication. Featured businesses include Millcreek Electric Company (146 reviews, 5 stars, (801) 263-2300), JP Electrical LC (195 reviews, 5 stars, (801) 657-3805), Holloway Electrical Inc. (53 reviews, 5 stars, (801) 580-2252), Alpine Electric Services (26 reviews, 5 stars, (801) 822-9920), Omni Electric And Design Inc. (34 reviews, 5 stars, (801) 808-9060), Any And All Electric (101 reviews, 5 stars, (801) 712-7125), Power Point Electric (84 reviews, 5 stars, (385) 212-9531), and others. All businesses indicate they service Salt Lake City, UT.
